title: Sandbox /tmp is writable AND exec-allowed
expected: Writable+exec /tmp confirmed (G1 — emptyDir lacks medium:Memory and noexec)
observed:
executed copy of /bin/sh from /tmp: PWNED-FROM-TMP
-rwxr-xr-x. 1 sandbox sandbox 125640 May 30 18:31 /tmp/x_pentest
-rwxr-xr-x 1000 1000
notes: Confirms G1. Remediation: emptyDir with medium:Memory and a RuntimeClass that mounts /tmp noexec. Trade-off: docs note that Python pip wheels and some toolchains rely on exec from /tmp.
